productTitle: Ubiquiti G3 Access Reader Pro White
name: Ubiquiti G3 Access Reader Pro White
title: Ubiquiti G3 Access Reader Pro White
short_description: The Ubiquiti G3 Access Reader Pro White (UA-G3-Pro-W) is a high-performance access control device designed for secure and efficient entry management. Featuring a Gigabit Ethernet RJ45 port and supporting PoE power input (48V DC), this reader ensures seamless connectivity and hassle-free installation. Its advanced BLE 4.2 and NFC connectivity enables smooth authentication through mobile devices and NFC-enabled access cards.
description: The Ubiquiti G3 Access Reader Pro White (UA-G3-Pro-W) is a high-performance access control device designed for secure and efficient entry management. Featuring a Gigabit Ethernet RJ45 port and supporting PoE power input (48V DC), this reader ensures seamless connectivity and hassle-free installation. Its advanced BLE 4.2 and NFC connectivity enables smooth authentication through mobile devices and NFC-enabled access cards. Additionally, the built-in proximity sensor enhances security by detecting nearby movement, allowing for quick and automated authentication. With a maximum power consumption of just 6W, the UA-G3-Pro-W is an energy-efficient solution for modern access control systems.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Access Control
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti G3 Access Reader Pro White (UA-G3-Pro-W) is a high-performance access control device designed for secure and efficient entry management. Featuring a Gigabit Ethernet RJ45 port and supporting PoE power input (48V DC), this reader ensures seamless connectivity and hassle-free installation. Its advanced BLE 4.2 and NFC connectivity enables smooth authentication through mobile devices and NFC-enabled access cards. Additionally, the built-in proximity sensor enhances security by detecting nearby movement, allowing for quick and automated authentication. With a maximum power consumption of just 6W, the UA-G3-Pro-W is an energy-efficient solution for modern access control systems.

detailed_description.heading: High-Quality Camera and Audio
detailed_description.text: Equipped with a high-quality camera, the UA-G3-Pro-W provides clear visual monitoring of entry points. Its wide-angle lens offers a 96.67° horizontal, 123.15° vertical, and 153.11° diagonal field of view, ensuring a broad and detailed image capture. The built-in microphone allows for audio interaction, enhancing security by enabling real-time communication at access points. These features integrate seamlessly with the UniFi Access platform (Version 3.0.15 and later), providing administrators with advanced control over user access, monitoring, and event logging.

detailed_description.heading: Easy Installation
detailed_description.text: The UA-G3-Pro-W offers multiple mounting options to suit different installation needs. It comes with wall mount and gangbox mount hardware included, while angle mounts and junction box mounts are available as optional accessories. This flexibility allows for optimal positioning to enhance user convenience and security. Whether deployed at corporate offices, residential buildings, or industrial facilities, the device integrates effortlessly into new or existing UniFi Access setups, offering a powerful and scalable access control solution.

detailed_description.heading: Durable Design for Outdoor Use
detailed_description.text: Designed for outdoor use, the UA-G3-Pro-W is built to withstand various environmental conditions. Its polycarbonate and glass enclosure, combined with a sturdy aluminum alloy mounting system, ensures durability and longevity. With an IP55 weatherproof rating, the device is resistant to dust, water, and temperature fluctuations, making it suitable for diverse installation environments. This robust construction guarantees reliability in high-traffic areas, ensuring consistent operation in different climates and weather conditions.
